perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown spaghetti strap top, is seen in a close-up shot lying on a bed with a blue and white striped sheet. She looks directly at the camera and speaks with an expressive facial expression. (2) As she narrates, she raises two fingers (index and middle) to illustrate a point. (3) She then raises three fingers (index, middle, ring) while continuing her story. (4) Finally, she holds her hand up with the palm facing the camera, showing her fingers and long manicured nails while smiling slightly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice begins speaking Mandarin Chinese in a clear, conversational, and storytelling tone. The environment is quiet with no background music. (2) The vocal narration continues with varied pitch and emphasis to convey the narrative flow. (3) As the speech ends, a subtle 'puzzled' SFX (resembling a soft hum) is heard, followed immediately by a short track of canned laughter.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "這個月的經期" (Functional: This month's period). (2) "好亂哦～" (Functional: is so messy/irregular~). (3) "我8號來一次" (Functional: I had it once on the 8th). (4) "15號來一次" (Functional: Once on the 15th). (5) "今天早上又來一次耶" (Functional: And again this morning). (6) "然後我就去看了醫生" (Functional: Then I went to see a doctor). (7) "醫生叫我把手伸出來" (Functional: The doctor asked me to put my hand out). (8) "我還以為他會看手相欸" (Functional: I thought he was going to read my palm). (9) "結果他說" (Functional: But then he said). (10) "我的指甲太長了" (Functional: My fingernails are too long).

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a short comedic skit or joke told in a first-person vlog format. The creator uses a personal anecdote about a 'messy' menstrual cycle and a visit to a doctor to set up a punchline involving a double-entendre or misunderstanding about long fingernails, intended for social media entertainment.
